summary: Footage of an outdoor event held in front of a tall border fence. A man in a dark jacket and tan trousers speaks at a podium bearing a Department of Homeland Security seal, flanked by rows of seated personnel in vests and uniforms marked ICE, HSI, and Border Patrol, with several U.S. flags behind them. An audience is seated in the foreground.

script.scene: A man speaks at a podium with a DHS seal in front of a border fence, flanked by seated personnel in ICE, HSI, and Border Patrol attire and U.S. flags.
The speaker continues addressing the seated audience.
The speaker looks down at the podium; the seated personnel and flags remain behind him.
